name: Pineapple Rhubarb Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle sugar over diced rhubarb.
2. Peel and dice the pineapples.
3. Combine the pineapple pieces and water in a pot.
4. Boil until the liquid is reduced to 2 cups.
5. Strain the mixture.
6. Add grated rind and juice of lemons, as well as chopped pineapples.
7. Cook rhubarb and sugar until clear.
8. Combine the two mixtures.
9. Add figs.
10. Simmer slowly, stirring constantly, until thick.
